basic_details.job_title: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Durgapur has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech/M.S or equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering/Material Science/Nanotechnology/Polymer Engineering with minimum of 65% or 6.5 CGPA
qualification.details: M.E./M.Tech/M.S or equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering/Material Science/Nanotechnology/Polymer Engineering with minimum of 65% or 6.5 CGPA from any recognized Institute/University. Prior research experience in nano-material fabrication and characterization is necessary. Experience in software like OriginPro, MATLAB and Python.

salary_details.details: Rs 37,000 + HRA (as per Institute Norms) per month for 1st and 2nd year Rs. 42,000 + HRA (as per Institute Norms) per month for the 3rd year

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.national_institute_of_technology_durgapu: M.E./M.Tech/M.S or equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering/Material Science/Nanotechnology/Polymer Engineering with minimum of 65% or 6.5 CGPA

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Durgapur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.E./M.Tech/M.S or equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering/Material Science/Nanotechnology/Polymer Engineering with minimum of 65% or 6.5 CGPA from any recognized Institute/University. Prior research experience in nano-material fabrication and characterization is necessary. Experience in software like OriginPro, MATLAB and Python.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs 37,000 + HRA (as per Institute Norms) per month for 1st and 2nd year Rs. 42,000 + HRA (as per Institute Norms) per month for the 3rd year

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Durgapur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at NIT Durgapur is 15-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech/M.S or equivalent degree in Electrical Engineering, Material Science, Nanotechnology, or Polymer Engineering with a minimum of 65% or 6.5 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs 37,000 + HRA per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000 + HRA per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITD/SM/EE/ANRF/ADV/2026-27/01.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIT Durgapur offer PhD opportunities for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates may be encouraged to pursue a PhD program under this project.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key selection criteria for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application screening, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q10. What specific experience is required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Prior research experience in nano-material fabrication and characterization is necessary, along with experience in software like OriginPro, MATLAB, and Python.
